## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (SwiftLint + hook-contract test)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] Touched the hook contract? Added/extended `Tests/hook-contract.sh`
- [ ] No untrusted text interpolated into a shell or AppleScript string
